name: Spring Peas & Lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lettuce into 3/4 cup of strips (packed). Save any remaining lettuce for another use.
2. Heat butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Add lettuce and peas. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Stir gently.
4. Cover the skillet and continue cooking until heated through, approximately 2 minutes.
Per serving: 78 calories, 4 grams protein, 11 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fiber, 2 grams fat (1 gram saturated), 349 milligrams sodium.
